target: 29. Hizuru Minakata
Hizuru Minakata
…I am.

July 22nd.
Boarded the ferry to Hitogashima Island at exactly 11 a.m.

I wasn't supposed to return.
It's been 14 years since I last came back…

If you're coming too…
It's been 14 years…

If that message hadn't existed,
I wouldn't be here now.
It was yesterday…

A voice file without a title
appeared in my voice recorder app
somehow.

I thought it might be you,
but if it were you, you'd have added a title.
I would too.

When I played it back,
there was a woman's voice I'd never heard before.

The recording quality wasn't great…
The audio was fragmented and full of noise…

But the content was enough…
To make me prepare for my 14-year-long return.

Nan-gu… Saki-se… Kiko… su-ka?
Listen carefully…

Now… Hitogashima…
Taito… ga… okor- te…

Kage… ga… ano ko… ga…
Haine… suru… ndo… !!

24th… summer festival…
Everyone was killed by the shadows…
Entire island… everyone…

Stop… able… wa…
Ajiro Shinpei… hito… dake…

But… just one person… can't…
We… need to combine… our… forces…

So… please… 
Come to Hitogashima…
Save… Shinpei…

Use… the teacher's… power… please…
Please…

The voice was probably a teenager…
High school student, maybe. There was a Wakayama dialect.

And she knew… her name…
――That's all.
(Lead is <color=#GF_TIPS_072>only this</color>…)

(Who is this?
Why does this woman know about me――)
Ushio!!

(…!?
What is this guy… suddenly…)
…Whoa!!?
(Whining like that, face buried in sweat…)

(Doesn't it hurt!?
No, maybe suffocation was the goal!?
Suicide candidate!?)

(It's interesting!
This guy's pretty unique!!)

Eh!!?
Ah…!

I'm sorry, I'm sorry!!
I didn't mean to…!!

(…What?
Apologizing…?!)
(Ordinary!!)
S-sorry…!!

(Being startled awake…
Hmm… depending on the content,
it might be a good novel idea…)

Are you okay?
You were having a really bad dream…
Did you have a nightmare?
A dream…?

Ah… that…
Have you ever been shot with a gun…? Ah, you have?
Huh!?
(This guy's still half-asleep…)
You… really okay?
Ah… no, nothing…

(What a boring thing…
Other people's dreams are the most boring…)
(It doesn't look like it'll be a good story…)
Welcome aboard――

(The crew member on the ramp…
No, that man's shadow…)

(At the moment of being stepped on,
it clearly moved…
So, he's a "Shadow"…)

(The credibility of that message
just went up a bit…)

Heyyy!! 
Welcome back "Shinchan"!!
(Shinchan…?)
Long trip, you're welcome back!!

…Shinchan.
Shin…

Shinpei…
Ajiro… Shinpei…?

(Is that the boy from earlier?
No, really…?)
(Anyway, I need to meet that old man)
